narration.label: Intro
narration.text: This is a feature tour of LevelUp — every major tool schools use for rewards, recognition, and motivation.

narration.label: Kiosk
narration.text: Students step up to the kiosk, scan in, and see their world of points instantly.

narration.label: ID cards
narration.text: Every student gets a digital ID card you can preview, print, and scan at the kiosk.

narration.label: Themes
narration.text: Create a student card theme — type a prompt, choose colors and gradients, and watch the ID card preview update live.

narration.label: Prizes
narration.text: The prize shop turns effort into something they can hold in their hands.

narration.label: Coupons
narration.text: Teachers print reward coupons without breaking stride in the classroom.

narration.label: Raffle
narration.text: Raffles transform everyday points into electric, school-wide moments.

narration.label: Houses
narration.text: House competitions unite grades in friendly rivalry that lasts all year.

narration.label: Hall of Fame
narration.text: The Hall of Fame celebrates leaders on a display the whole school can see.

narration.label: Notifications
narration.text: Smart notifications keep staff ahead of inventory, milestones, and surprises.

narration.label: Bulletin
narration.text: The bulletin board broadcasts pride, news, and momentum.

narration.label: Library
narration.text: Library checkout weaves reading into the same rewards story.

narration.label: Badges
narration.text: Badges and goals give every student a path to be recognized.

narration.label: Analytics
narration.text: Insights reveal what is working — class by class, week by week.

narration.label: Attendance
narration.text: Attendance ties the kiosk to how your school already runs the day.

narration.label: Outro
narration.text: LevelUp — one platform, countless ways to motivate. Welcome to what school rewards can be.

copy.introTagline: Every major feature in one platform
copy.outroSubline: Scan-first · Live sync · Built for students
